'''fopangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaccinatable|vaccinatable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaccinatable|vaccinatable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fopangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fopangithi|fopangithi]] || [[word:fopangiji|fopangiji]] || [[word:fopangishi|fopangishi]] || [[word:fopangiki|fopangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fopanguthuthu|fopanguthuthu]] || [[word:fopangujuju|fopangujuju]] || [[word:fopangushushu|fopangushushu]] || [[word:fopangukuku|fopangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fopanguthu|fopanguthu]] || [[word:fopanguju|fopanguju]] || [[word:fopangushu|fopangushu]] || [[word:fopanguku|fopanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fopangufthuf|fopangufthuf]] || [[word:fopangufjuf|fopangufjuf]] || [[word:fopangufshuf|fopangufshuf]] || [[word:fopangufkuf|fopangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fopangethe|fopangethe]] || [[word:fopangeje|fopangeje]] || [[word:fopangeshe|fopangeshe]] || [[word:fopangeke|fopangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fopangothotho|fopangothotho]] || [[word:fopangojojo|fopangojojo]] || [[word:fopangoshosho|fopangoshosho]] || [[word:fopangokoko|fopangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fopangotho|fopangotho]] || [[word:fopangojo|fopangojo]] || [[word:fopangosho|fopangosho]] || [[word:fopangoko|fopangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fopangofthof|fopangofthof]] || [[word:fopangofjof|fopangofjof]] || [[word:fopangofshof|fopangofshof]] || [[word:fopangofkof|fopangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfthĂŻf|fopangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfjĂŻf|fopangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfshĂŻf|fopangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfkĂŻf|fopangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|fopangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|fopangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|fopangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|fopangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfthĂŻf|fopangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfjĂŻf|fopangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfshĂŻf|fopangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfkĂŻf|fopangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfthĂŻf|fopangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfjĂŻf|fopangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfshĂŻf|fopangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fopangĂŻfkĂŻf|fopangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fopangĂŠthĂŠ|fopangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:fopangĂŠjĂŠ|fopangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:fopangĂŠshĂŠ|fopangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:fopangĂŠkĂŠ|fopangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fopangathatha|fopangathatha]] || [[word:fopangajaja|fopangajaja]] || [[word:fopangashasha|fopangashasha]] || [[word:fopangakaka|fopangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fopangatha|fopangatha]] || [[word:fopangaja|fopangaja]] || [[word:fopangasha|fopangasha]] || [[word:fopangaka|fopangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fopangafthaf|fopangafthaf]] || [[word:fopangafjaf|fopangafjaf]] || [[word:fopangafshaf|fopangafshaf]] || [[word:fopangafkaf|fopangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fopangasha|fopangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fopangshĂ«asha|fopangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fopangroasha|fopangroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fopangmuasha|fopangmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fopangyaasha|fopangyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofopangnkshĂ«asha|gofopangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofopangnkroasha|gofopangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofopangnkmuasha|gofopangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofopangnkyaasha|gofopangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fopapangasha|fopapangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fopapangshĂ«asha|fopapangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fopapangroasha|fopapangroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fopapangmuasha|fopapangmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fopapangyaasha|fopapangyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofopapangnkshĂ«asha|gofopapangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofopapangnkroasha|gofopapangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofopapangnkmuasha|gofopapangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofopapangnkyaasha|gofopapangnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fepĂŠngasha|fepĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fepĂŠngshĂ«asha|fepĂŠngshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fepĂŠngroasha|fepĂŠngroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fepĂŠngmuasha|fepĂŠngmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fepĂŠngyaasha|fepĂŠngyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofepĂŠngnkshĂ«asha|gofepĂŠngnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofepĂŠngnkroasha|gofepĂŠngnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofepĂŠngnkmuasha|gofepĂŠngnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofepĂŠngnkyaasha|gofepĂŠngnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fopfangasha|fopfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fopfangshĂ«asha|fopfangshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fopfangroasha|fopfangroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fopfangmuasha|fopfangmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fopfangyaasha|fopfangyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofopfangnkshĂ«asha|gofopfangnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofopfangnkroasha|gofopfangnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofopfangnkmuasha|gofopfangnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofopfangnkyaasha|gofopfangnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
